question.text: Which of the following statements about NPS Asset Class A (Alternative Investments) is CORRECT?

answer.text: It is available for both Tier I and Tier II accounts
It is available under both Active and Auto Choice
It is available only under Active Choice and NOT for Tier II accounts
It is available under Auto Choice with a cap of 5% in the Aggressive Life Cycle

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS Asset Class A (Alternative Investments) has two key restrictions: (1) it is NOT available for Tier II accounts, and (2) it is only available to subscribers who opt for Active Choice. Auto Choice life cycle funds do not allocate to Asset Class A. **The Trap:** The option stating "both Active and Auto Choice" is tempting because all other asset classes (E, C, G) are available under both choices, making it easy to assume A follows the same rule. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series X-A (Investment Adviser Level 1) covers NPS structure and choice architecture; this question tests the specific restrictions unique to Asset Class A. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When a client asks about alternatives in NPS, first confirm they have a Tier I account AND have opted for Active Choice -- otherwise Asset Class A is simply not an option for them.
